name: build-swift-apps
description: Build, debug, profile, test, package, and release Swift apps across iOS and macOS.

interface.shortDescription: Build, refine, debug, test, profile, and ship iOS and macOS apps with Swift workflows
interface.longDescription: A Swift development bundle that combines iOS, macOS, SwiftUI, AppKit, Xcode, SwiftPM, simulator debugging, build-performance analysis, App Store Connect, firmware inspection, RocketSim, UI testing, Apple developer search, Tuist, and Apple-platform release workflows.
defaultPrompt: Build or debug an iOS app on a simulator.
Benchmark and fix Xcode build performance.
